description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these yacht lifestyle shoes from timberland. This two-hole lace up pair is a fresh take on the classic design and looks good on the yacht and off it.UpperLeather upper for comfort and protection Stitch detailing in the sides Contrast lace-ups for snug FitLeather lining for greater comfort MidsoleCushioned insole for all day comfort PU midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber non-marking outsole with thin herringbone grooves Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
